title: hydrocotyle hirta var. pusilla
intro: Hydrocotyle hirta var. pusilla, also known as dwarf pennywort, is a plant species belonging to the mint family and is native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Hydrocotyle hirta var. pusilla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine, and its extracts have also been studied for potential modern applications.
